application.auto_update_description: Automatically checks for new versions and prepares update downloads.
application.default_email_description: Use LlamaMail for `mailto:` links from browsers and other apps.
application.default_email_already_set: LlamaMail is already your default email app.
application.language_description: Sets the app interface language for menus, labels, and settings.
application.minimize_to_tray_description: Keeps LlamaMail running in the background when minimized.
application.show_unread_in_titlebar_description: Adds unread count to the window title when new mail is available.
application.spell_check_description: Highlights misspelled words in editors and compose fields.
application.notification_sound_description: Plays an alert sound for new mail notifications.
application.hardware_acceleration_description: Uses your GPU to render the app. Disable if you see flickering, blank windows, or driver issues.

layout.titlebar_restart_required: Changing titlebar mode requires restarting the app.
layout.titlebar_restart_queued: Restart queued: will switch to {{mode}} titlebar.
layout.mail_view_description: Side List keeps folders and message list side-by-side. Top Table places a compact table above message preview.

status.titlebar_change_queued: Titlebar change queued. Restart required to apply.

account_email.email_module_description: Enable mailbox sync for this account and configure IMAP/SMTP endpoints.
account_email.enable_email_description: Disable to hide inbox and pause email sync jobs.
account_email.inbox_sync_description: Control mailbox sync behavior and message list ordering.
account_email.enable_email_above: Enable Email above to configure sync interval, history, and list ordering.
account_email.connection_oauth_managed: Incoming and outgoing server credentials are managed by your provider.

account_filters.title: Rules
account_filters.subtitle: Configure account-level rules that run on incoming mail or manually on demand.
account_filters.no_folders_for_account: No folders available for this account yet
account_filters.modal_subtitle: Configure matching rules and actions for this account.

developer.title: Developer Settings
developer.subtitle: Enable runtime diagnostics for in-app overlays and debug features.
developer.show_debug_nav_description: Adds or removes the Debug item from the left navigation rail.
developer.show_route_overlay_description: Displays current route hash in the bottom-right for navigation/debugging.
developer.show_send_notifications_description: Shows bottom-right progress cards for background email sending.
developer.show_system_failures_description: Shows bottom-right error cards for sync/authentication failures.
developer.demo_mode_description: Loads screenshot-friendly demo accounts and sample emails locally.
developer.send_notification_preview_description: Show a mock background send notification for design/debug.
developer.test_actions_subtitle: Trigger desktop notifications, updater UI, and debugging tools.

status.notifications_not_supported: System notifications are not supported in this environment.

status.preview_send_notification: Previewing send notification in main window.

whitelist.title: Remote Content Whitelist
whitelist.subtitle: Control remote image loading and sender/domain exceptions used while viewing emails.
whitelist.block_remote_content_description: Protects privacy by blocking external images and trackers until explicitly allowed.
whitelist.invalid_entry: Enter a valid sender email or domain.

account_identity.signature_description: Signature content is HTML-enabled and appended to outgoing messages.
